title: Pan-Seared Canadian Paella
description: A twist on the classic Spanish dish, this recipe features Canadian bacon and a crispy crust on the bottom.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan over medium-high heat.
Add the Canadian bacon and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the potatoes, thyme, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper. Cook for 5 minutes.
Add the paella rice and stir to combine.
Cook for 2-3 minutes, until the rice is coated in oil and slightly toasted.
Add 2 cups of water to the pan and bring to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, for 20-25 minutes, or until the rice is tender and the liquid has been absorbed.
Remove the pan from the heat and let it rest, covered, for 5 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
